/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/sum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/sum_srv_interface/srv/detail/sum__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
